summary: A good‑quality stereo audience tape of the classic 4/17 show; well‑rounded performance makes it a great listen.
review: The three reviews praise this recording as a solid, unique snapshot of the April 17, 1971 concert.  Listeners note that, although labeled mono, the tape is actually in stereo and sounds almost on par with the famed 8/6/71 audience recording, delivering a clear and enjoyable listening experience despite lacking a soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed positive reviews and one brief five‑star note highlight both strong show performance and good audience‑tape quality; limited number of comments keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Stereo audience tape despite label indicating mono; clear, well‑balanced sound comparable to the renowned 8/6/71 recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific set‑list comments; reviewers describe the show as well‑rounded and unique.
